choices.text: Pull: start at end date, work backward, each trade pulls predecessors, collaborative sessions identify handoffs. Traditional push: PM schedules, gives to trades. Pull surfaces dependencies + creates buy-in. Part of Last Planner System.

PPC (Percent Plan Complete): each week, plan tasks for next week → track which actually complete. PPC = completed/planned. Target 80%+. Improves over time as constraints resolved before commitment. Key Lean Construction metric.
